title: What would your reaction be
summary: []: What would your reaction be...             Quote Post by Cypher » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:14 pm Hey I am new here, so sorry if this post has already been done. But anyway I was wondering what your reaction would be if you were one of the first humans to return to a separate form after the events of EoE and the first things you see are: 1) Lilith/Rei's rotting corpse, 2) Impaled MP evas littering the land scape, 3) Everything

chunks.content:
Article: What would your reaction be
[]: What would your reaction be...             Quote Post by Cypher » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:14 pm Hey I am new here, so sorry if this post has already been done. But anyway I was wondering what your reaction would be if you were one of the first humans to return to a separate form after the events of EoE and the first things you see are: 1) Lilith/Rei's rotting corpse, 2) Impaled MP evas littering the land scape, 3) Everything is blood red. Personally I think I would want to return to the goo.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:15 pm Well I would first go.... "how the hell did I end up in Tokyo!"

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:48 pm Probably say something along the lines of "How drunk was I last night? Fuck...", followed by establishing a grassroots libertarian movement to get all this government shit right this time around before enjoying a hearty meal of goddess-flesh sushi and people juice.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:51 pm I'd be like "Why does my throat hurt?"

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Mon Jun 15, 2009 4:59 pm Poke dead GNR in the eye... then go enjoy tokyo without the crowds

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Mon Jun 15, 2009 5:11 pm Time to loot!

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Mon Jun 15, 2009 9:39 pm I would immediately find guns and take over. The world would be created in my image.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 15, 2009 10:15 pm I'd probably wonder "Where the fuck am I?" and be completely unable to tell that the "disembodied and hallucinogenic" phase of things is actually over. At least, until I take a dump. Nothing like some loose stools born of lactose intolerance to make you realize, "Yep, this is real, and it totally sucks."

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan

Article: What would your reaction be
 over. At least, until I take a dump. Nothing like some loose stools born of lactose intolerance to make you realize, "Yep, this is real, and it totally sucks."

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Mon Jun 15, 2009 10:32 pm "Why am I in a lake of tang?" "Huh...mutilated, giant naked chick..." "That must have been some good shit I smoked last night."

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jun 15, 2009 11:45 pm I'd look for Kaworu but thats just me

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Jun 15, 2009 11:59 pm I'd probably wonder why I am now animated.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Jun 16, 2009 12:02 am I would just walk around aimlessly...naked.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 16, 2009 12:13 am Action_Bastard wrote: I would just walk around aimlessly...naked.

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Tue Jun 16, 2009 12:31 am I'd be looking at the Rei head and think "I don't want to be here when that head starts to rot."

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jun 16, 2009 1:35 am Reichu wrote: BrikHaus wrote: I'd probably wonder why I am now animated.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 16, 2009 2:24 am Most likely I'd have excess LCL/tang in me and take a piss. Then realize Big Naked Rei has been watching me the whole time. Then I'd... um ... go look for a dog or something to hang with. i guess.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Jun 16, 2009 3:26 am "Oh... my... fucking... god. What in the fuck just happened?"

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue Jun 16, 2009 7:23 am Set up a colony and start a cult dedicated to the giant boob

[]

Article: What would your reaction be
... god. What in the fuck just happened?"

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Tue Jun 16, 2009 7:23 am Set up a colony and start a cult dedicated to the giant boob

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Jun 16, 2009 10:03 am "Why's that whiny dude throttling the redhead chick?" "Where did I park the car?"

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 16, 2009 11:09 am "Where the fuck am I and what the fuck happened? How the hell did a blue haired Japanese girl appear out of nowhere? Why was she smiling and why did I explode when she touched? Am I dead?! What the hell is going on?! Holy crap! Scientology was right! This must be Lord Xenu's doing! I must drink from the bloody sea so I may become immortal and all powerful and bring the fight to him!!! WITH THE POWER OF GALACTUS I COME TO THEE!!!!"
